title: Supervisor Agent is now available by default for Enhanced Security and Compliance customers
body:
Supervisor Agent is now available by default for workspaces with the [compliance security profile](/aws/en/security/privacy/security-profile) enabled and HIPAA, FedRAMP Moderate, PCI-DSS, or HITRUST controls selected.

Use Supervisor Agent to create a multi-agent supervisor system that orchestrates AI agents and tools to work together on complex tasks.

See [Use Supervisor Agent to create a coordinated multi-agent system](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/multi-agent-supervisor).

ref_links.text: Use Supervisor Agent to create a coordinated multi-agent system
